no: Solaufein both mods are compatible. Read Jastey's documentation for more info [Weimer's Solaufein placeholder] Jastey's Solaufein's Rescue It may look like a quest mod with an NPC, but author said it's actually an NPC mod with a quest :_P Can be used as a 7th party member

conflicts.reason: Both add Solaufein as a joinable NPC. Choose one. Jastey's is actively maintained; Roxanne's is older but has romance content

sum: Transforms Solaufein into a recruitable NPC companion for Baldur's Gate II by adding a quest to rescue him from the drider chambers before he can join the party.

co.tp2n: Solaufein in Ust Natha das Mod-Portrait geben
